name: Emeril's Creole Succotash
recipeIngredient: 2 cups corn kernels, fresh or frozen
1 cup lima beans or fava beans, fresh or frozen - cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add garlic and shallots; sauté until transparent, about 2 to 3 minutes.
2. Stir in corn and beans; cook for 3 to 4 minutes.
3. Add tomatoes and onion; cook an additional five minutes.
4. Mix in Creole seasoning and beer; simmer lightly for 15 to 20 minutes.
5. Stir in herbs, red pepper sauce, and Worcestershire sauce; cook another 5 minutes.
6. Serve hot. Serves 4 to 6.
Per serving: 212 calories; 7 grams protein; 4 grams fat; 36 grams carbohydrate; 0 cholesterol; 64 milligrams sodium; 7 grams fiber. Vegetarian Times, December 1992/MM by DEEANNE
